ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_EVENT.title: Astral Event
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_EVENT.description: A special card originating from the Astral Party event system.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_STEPS.title: Steps
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_STEPS.description: Steps gained from room entry for [Persona: Bionic Jasmine]. Unassigned, Rest Site, Shop, Treasure, Monster, and Map rooms grant 2. Event rooms grant 3. Elite rooms grant 6. Boss rooms grant 10.
